hero.rating: site na ndị nne na nna 320+

about.heading1: Ụlọ akwụkwọ ebe a maara nwa ọ bụla, hụ ya, ma

stats.title: Afọ iri na isii nke mmetụta a na-atụle

whyUs.badge: Ihe Kpatara Ndị Nne Na Nna Na-ahọrọ Anyị
whyUs.description: Site na obere nkọwa nke nlekọta kwa ụbọchị ruo n'ọchịchọ kachasị obi ike nke onye gụsịrị akwụkwọ Glider — akụkụ ọ bụla nke ụlọ akwụkwọ anyị e mere iji nyere nwa gị aka ịrịgo.

academics.title1: Mmemme maka ọgwa ọ bụla nke
academics.description: Site na ịtụnanya nke Nursery ruo obi ike nke Praịmarị 6, ụzọ anyị nwere ọkwa atọ na-eduzi onye ọ bụla Glider site na usoro ọmụmụ siri ike, nke nwere ọṅụ, ma bụrụ nke Africa.
academics.highlights: Ihe Ndị Dị Iche na Mmemme

faculty.description: Ndị nwere asambodo, nwere mmasị, ma na-echedo ndị ọzọ — ndị nkụzi anyị bụ mkpụrụ obi nke Trail Gliders. Ha na-enye ndụmọdụ, na-akpali, ma na-aga n'ihu na nwa ọ bụla.

testimonials.title1: Ndị nne na nna hụrụ n'anya.

admissions.paragraph: Ma ị na-esonye site na Nursery ma ọ bụ ị na-ebufe na Praịmarị 5, anyị na-eme njem nabata na-ekpo ọkụ, nke doro anya, na nke na-anabata.
admissions.limitedSpots: Oghere ole na ole dị na ọkwa niile.
admissions.scholarships: Agụm akwụkwọ dị maka ụmụ akwụkwọ pụrụ iche
admissions.admissionsReplies: Otu anyị nabata na-aza n'ime awa 24.

faq.description: Ihe niile ị kwesịrị ịma banyere ndụ na Trail Gliders. Ị pụghị ịchọta azịza gị? Kpọtụrụ otu anyị n'oge ọ bụla.

contact.description: Inwere ajụjụ banyere nabata, mmemme, ma ọ bụ ndụ ụlọ akwụkwọ? Kpọtụrụ anyị — otu anyị ga-aza n'ime ụbọchị ọrụ otu.
contact.formDescription: Jiri fom dị n'okpụ mee ya ma anyị ga-alaghachi azụ ngwa ngwa.
contact.subject: M nwere mmasị na
contact.messagePlaceholder: Gwa anyị maka nwa gị na ihe ịchọrọ ịma...
contact.messageReceived: E nwetara ozi. Anyị ga-aza n'ime awa 24.
contact.messageSent: E zitere ozi! Anyị ga-aza n'ime awa 24.
contact.privacyNote: Site n'itinye, ị kwenyere na a ga-akpọtụrụ gị site na Trail Gliders Academy.
contact.protectedSpam: Echedo pụọ na spam nke akpanaka

footer.readyDesc: Nabata maka oge 2026/2027 mepee ugbu a. Hazie njem taa.
footer.subscribed: I debanyere aha! Lelee igbe ozi gị maka mmelite Glider.
